name: Hindsight Memory
description: Auto-recall injects relevant Hindsight memories before agent turns (configurable: off, first-turn-only, every-N-turns). Auto-retain batches stale conversations and ingests them for fact extraction. Feedback loop prevention strips injected memories from retained content. File-based buffers survive crashes. Entity pre-tagging, scoped tags, metadata, and derived context improve extraction quality.

autoRecall.description: Legacy toggle — use recallMode instead. When recallMode is set, this is derived automatically.

recallMode.description: When to inject memories: 'off' = disabled, 'first' = first turn only, 'every-n' = every N turns (default: off)

recallEveryN.description: For recallMode 'every-n': inject memories every N turns (default: 5)

recallMinPromptLength.description: Minimum prompt length (after metadata stripping) to trigger recall (default: 10)

recallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for recall API call in milliseconds (default: 5000)

recallSkipPatterns.description: Patterns in prompt that skip recall entirely (default: ["Read HEARTBEAT.md"])

recallTypes.description: Fact types to recall (world, experience, observation). Empty = include all (default: [])

recallSessionTypes.description: Session types to auto-recall for (dm, group, main). Empty = all sessions (default: [])

recallDedup.description: Skip memory injection if identical results to last turn for this session (default: true)

context.description: Fallback context tag when session type/provider can't be derived (default: conversation)

assistantName.description: Name label for assistant messages in transcript (default: Assistant)

staleAfterMs.description: Milliseconds of inactivity before flushing a conversation (default: 3600000 = 1h)

checkIntervalMs.description: How often to check for stale sessions in ms (default: 60000 = 1m)

rollingMessages.description: Number of messages from previous batch to include as context overlap (default: 5)

minMessages.description: Minimum buffered messages required to flush (default: 2)

skipRoles.description: Roles to exclude from transcript (default: [tool, toolResult])

flushTriggerPatterns.description: Patterns in first user message that trigger immediate buffer flush (turn itself is not buffered)

requireProviders.description: Only buffer from these channel providers (default: [discord, telegram])

agentIds.description: Only process messages for these agent IDs. Empty array = all agents (default: [])

sessionTtlMs.description: Purge inactive session entries after this duration in ms (default: 604800000 = 7d)

recallMode.label: Recall Mode
recallMode.help: off = disabled, first = session start only, every-n = periodic

recallDedup.label: Recall Dedup
recallDedup.help: Skip injection if same memories as last turn

agentIds.label: Agent IDs
agentIds.help: Only listed agents get auto-capture and auto-recall. Empty = all agents.
